artPrompt: The dramatic moment of ruin: a quaint lakeside cottage cracks and slumps toward a churning green reservoir, its foundation crumbling into sludge as a blank weathered for-sale stake leans abandoned in the toxic mud, a monstrous shadow rippling beneath the water beyond. Bruised storm sky above. Wide landscape collapse, murky green and rust-red washes bleeding into sickly glow. Rendered as loose ink-and-watercolor — confident brush linework, bleeding translucent washes, a limited palette, generous negative space.
name: Property Value Collapse
text: Destroy target artifact or land. Its controller may not file a complaint with the Mayor about it. (There is a monster in the reservoir. Nobody's buying.)
flavorText: "Cozy fixer-upper, lake view, motivated seller, please, please buy it."
